title: Fit test - 2nd screen "Cancel" during test
scenario: Fit Test cancellation during active test does not show Cancel/Retry options at bottom of screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap 'Start Test' button to begin the fit test
While the fit test is running, tap 'Cancel' button
expected: The fit test is interrupted. A Cancel/Retry option appears at the bottom of the screen.
